summary: Tested 4 mobile UI bug fixes for Golf Mallorca portal. All fixes verified working correctly on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports.

mobile_tests.scroll_indicator_hidden: PASS - Scroll indicator has display:none on mobile (hidden sm:flex class working)
mobile_tests.trip_planner_button_visible: PASS - Trip Planner pill button visible and not overlapped
mobile_tests.worldwide_banner_button: PASS - 'Explore Courses' button within viewport (x:68, width:254), full-width on mobile
mobile_tests.worldwide_banner_text: PASS - Text readable with proper mobile layout
mobile_tests.contact_title_not_cutoff: PASS - 'Book Your Mallorca Golf Holiday' title within viewport (x:48, width:294)
mobile_tests.contact_form_margins: PASS - Form fields have proper margins (name input x:48)
mobile_tests.section_navigator_dots: PASS - Navigation dots visible on mobile after scrolling past hero

desktop_tests.scroll_indicator_visible: PASS - Scroll indicator visible on desktop (display:flex)
desktop_tests.contact_2column_layout: PASS - Contact section has 2-column grid layout
desktop_tests.decorative_element_visible: PASS - Decorative element visible on desktop (lg:block)
desktop_tests.section_navigator_hover_zone: PASS - SectionNavigator hover zone exists on desktop

image_optimization.decoding_async: PASS - decoding='async' attribute present on card images in GolfCourses.jsx and HotelPartners.jsx

passed_tests: Mobile: Scroll indicator hidden (hidden sm:flex class)
Mobile: Trip Planner button visible without overlap
Mobile: 'Play Golf Wherever You Are' banner - text readable, button full-width
Mobile: Contact section - title not cut off, form margins correct, image no overflow
Mobile: SectionNavigator dots visible after scrolling
Desktop: Contact section 2-column layout with decorative element
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx Line 95: 'hidden sm:flex' correctly hides scroll indicator on mobile (<640px)
GolfCourses.jsx Lines 261-303: Mobile-first responsive classes properly implemented (flex-col md:flex-row, w-full md:w-auto)
Contact.jsx Line 70: overflow-hidden on section prevents horizontal scroll
Contact.jsx Line 173: overflow-hidden on right side container
Contact.jsx Line 185: 'hidden lg:block' correctly hides decorative element on mobile
GolfCourses.jsx Line 23: decoding='async' added for faster image loading

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 4 mobile UI bug fixes verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested 4 mobile UI bug fixes: (1) scroll indicator hidden on mobile via 'hidden sm:flex', (2) 'Play Golf Wherever You Are' banner mobile layout improved with flex-col and full-width button, (3) Contact section overflow fixed with overflow-hidden and decorative element hidden on mobile, (4) decoding='async' added to images. All fixes working correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports.

issue_1.description: Scroll mouse indicator overlaps Trip Planner pill button in hero
issue_1.fix: Added 'hidden sm:flex' class to scroll indicator (Hero.jsx line 95)
issue_1.status: VERIFIED - Scroll indicator hidden on mobile, visible on desktop

issue_2.description: 'Play Golf Wherever You Are' banner with white pill 'Explore Courses' looks bad on mobile
issue_2.fix: Mobile-first responsive classes: flex-col md:flex-row, w-full md:w-auto for button
issue_2.status: VERIFIED - Banner has vertical layout on mobile with full-width button, horizontal on desktop

issue_3.description: Contact form 'Book Your Mallorca Golf Holiday' is cut off on the right side along with the image
issue_3.fix: Added overflow-hidden to section and right container, hidden decorative element on mobile
issue_3.status: VERIFIED - No overflow, all content within viewport on mobile

issue_4.description: Card images load slowly on mobile
issue_4.fix: Added decoding='async' to images in GolfCourses.jsx and HotelPartners.jsx
